---
name: Oracle
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Do a comprehensive analysis of the package to determine which "large" feature would be best to implement next. Right now the package is a core of cooperating features that compose with each other and a GUI backend which glues them all together. There's plenty of work to still do so this question is about prioritization, in the "large" aspects - other systems that would naturally fit these existing systems and the extensions would result in genuinely more flexible or otherwise improved behaviours - rank the best candidates in order of the best to implement first so subsequent systems will have them from the start.
